title: Marketplace Manager - JioMart - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - JioMart - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Join the JioMart family as a Marketplace Manager in Pune. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About JioMart:
JioMart is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with JioMart!
